name: @victronenergy/node-red-contrib-victron
description: Custom Node-RED Nodes for Victron Energy

scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run build:test && npm run test:unit
scripts.release: git tag -d v$npm_package_version; git tag v$npm_package_version && git push --tags && git push && npm run create-release
scripts.documentation: bash -c '( sed "/^<!--/q" src/nodes/config-client.html && node scripts/service2doc.js -s src/services/services.json -r src/nodes/victron-nodes.html -o nodered ) | sponge src/nodes/config-client.html'
scripts.wiki: bash -c 'S="src/services/services.json" R="src/nodes/victron-nodes.html"; node scripts/service2doc.js -s $S -r $R -o md --page index   | sponge ../node-red-contrib-victron.wiki/Available-nodes.md && node scripts/service2doc.js -s $S -r $R -o md --page input   | sponge ../node-red-contrib-victron.wiki/Input-nodes.md && node scripts/service2doc.js -s $S -r $R -o md --page output  | sponge ../node-red-contrib-victron.wiki/Output-nodes.md && node scripts/service2doc.js -s $S -r $R -o md --page virtual | sponge ../node-red-contrib-victron.wiki/Virtual-devices.md && node scripts/service2doc.js -s $S -r $R -o md --page sidebar | sponge ../node-red-contrib-victron.wiki/_Sidebar.md'
scripts.prepare: husky || echo "WARNING: husky not available, proceeding"
